items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
That said, LAC lost the possession battle, and that allowed the Kings to rack up points despite poor jump-shooting. 

The Clippers were hacks too (Wagler, Miller, Omier had 13 of the 23 Clippers fouls), it's just that the Kings took more away from the Clippers offense over a longer period of time.

Jackson—once a head coach in the Continental Basketball Association—became the third head coach hired by owner Jerry Reinsdorf since 1985.

items.title: July 10, 1996: Grant Hill finishes the break with a reverse dunk (off the assist from Anfernee Hardaway) during an exhibition game between the USA and China in Phoenix.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 10, 1996: Grant Hill finishes the break with a reverse dunk (off the assist from Anfernee Hardaway) during an exhibition game between the USA and China in Phoenix.

"Dream Team III" shot 69%, had 24 dunks and scored 44 PTS off turnovers in a 119-58 win. Hill scored 14 PTS.
